action.reasoning: Observation: iter_26 MLP training failed with huge negative R², confirming linear model is more stable. Best score is 0.304 from Ridge on full data with alpha=1.0. Analysis: Ridge alpha not tuned; optimal regularization could improve generalization. With ~12 min and 4 iterations left, a quick alpha tuning on subsample followed by full-data refit can boost score. Decision: write tune_alpha.py to sweep alphas, pick best via val R² on subsample, refit on full data with chosen alpha, save new linear_model.npz. Then submit eval immediately to capture improvement.
